title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
hints: Use stack to find nearest smaller element on left (nsl) and right (nsr) for each bar.
For each bar, the width of rectangle it can form is (nsr[i] - nsl[i] - 1).
Area for each bar = A[i] * width.
Find the maximum area among all bars.
Use monotonic stack to efficiently find nearest smaller elements.
Initialize nsl with -1 and nsr with n (array length) for boundary cases.
